name: Xhino Mullaymeri
headline: AI/ML/LLM Engineer specializing in financial crime solutions
description: Engineer with 4 years of experience in machine learning and large language models, delivering AI-driven solutions from research to deployment.

bio: Engineer with 4 years of experience specializing in machine learning and large language models (LLMs). Skilled at identifying complex problems, designing ML/AI/data-driven solutions, and building robust systems from research to deployment.

An early adopter who stays at the forefront of AI advancements, proactively leveraging emerging tools and techniques to deliver innovative solutions. Looking to apply this expertise to solving real-world problems and driving impact.

expertise.title: Machine Learning
expertise.description: Expertise in supervised and unsupervised learning, model training, evaluation, and deployment.

expertise.title: Generative AI
expertise.description: Specialization in LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and evaluation frameworks.

expertise.title: Data Science
expertise.description: Proficient in data wrangling, EDA, statistical modeling, and visualization.

expertise.title: Anti-Money Laundering
expertise.description: Developed AI/ML-driven solutions to detect and prevent financial crime.

education.focus: Thesis: "Can LLM systems replace Chemical Engineers?"
Thesis: "A two-party private string matching fuzzy vault scheme"

projects.title: League of Fusions
projects.description: Innovated a captivating game utilizing DALL-E 3's AI image generation capabilities, overseeing all backend development tasks.

projects.title: Coronosms
projects.description: A simple Android app created with 2k+ downloads to ease life during COVID-19 quarantine in Greece.

workExperience.title: ML / AI / LLM Engineer - Research | Oracle Labs, Copenhagen
workExperience.description: Delivered multiple projects developing AI/ML-driven Anti-Money Laundering (AML) solutions to detect and prevent financial crime.
workExperience.detailedDescription: Applied LLM advanced techniques including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM tools integration, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering. Designed and ran LLM evaluation frameworks, collaborating with subject matter experts (SMEs) and using LLM-as-a-judge approaches. Built prototypes and pipelines leveraging LangChain/LangGraph. Improved the time performance of the main entity resolution task by ~40%.

workExperience.title: Robotics Instructor | Robotics Academy UoM, Thessaloniki
workExperience.description: Taught educational robotics to diverse age groups and developed curriculum.
workExperience.detailedDescription: Curriculum development and R&D in educational robotics. Trained and mentored 20 instructors across Greece.

talksAndAwards.title: World Robot Olympiad (WRO) Advanced Robotics Challenge
talksAndAwards.description: Participated in international robotics competition with 3 fellow students.
talksAndAwards.detailedDescription: 2017: 1st place, WRO ARC National Championship (Greece); 16th place globally, WRO International Final, Costa Rica. 2018: 2nd place WRO ARC Greece. Presented robotic prototypes at Thessaloniki International Fair (TIF), 2017-2019.

talksAndAwards.title: Publications
talksAndAwards.description: Published research papers on privacy-preserving record linkage.
talksAndAwards.detailedDescription:
- Using Fuzzy Vaults for Privacy Preserving Record Linkage. DOLAP. 2021.
- A two-party private string matching fuzzy vault scheme. Proceedings of the 36th annual ACM symposium on applied computing. 2021.
